svg.text: Era I: rounds 1–5 | Era II: 6–10 | Era III: 11–15
LEGEND — T=Taxation U=Upkeep D=Defense mod A=Attack mod
■ Grassland T:3 U:1 ■ Mountain T:1 U:3 D+2 ■ Forest T:1 U:2 D+1
■ Swamp T:0 U:1 D+1 ×2 ■ Desert T:1 U:0 A+1 disadv ■ Ocean T:1 U:0 Navy
■ Capitol T:4 U:1 D+2 ×3 disadv ★ Ancient Ruins T:2 U:2 D−1 +1Wild
×2/×3 = attacks needed to conquer. D−1 = easier to attack.
Upkeep scaling: 6–9 regions +1, 10+ regions +2 to all upkeep.
Draw Fail or Success → reshuffle entire deck immediately.
Advantage: draw 2, pick best (Fail ignored, Success → reshuffle).
Disadvantage: draw 2, pick worst (Success ignored, Fail → reshuffle).
vs. Independent region: use Ind. State deck (no Fail, reshuffle each attack).
Earlier position = first market pick. Later = bonus + last attack of round.
No bonus | First market pick each round
Selection order: holder of pos 1 last era picks first, then clockwise. Game start: random.
3 regions of same type with buildings.
First to max out any class track.
AWARDS — Fund: 1 mkt action + 3g → scores 5VP / 2VP at end
Each round end: last-place player draws 1 catch-up card.
Last = fewest regions → lowest income → lowest taxation.
Colored face — separate from modifier deck after game.
Base actions per era: I: 1 atk + 1 mkt | II: 2+2 | III: 3+3
MARKET ACTION — spend 1 market action to:
• Buy a card (Empire: needs free slot; Action: execute + trash)
• Attacker vs Defender: sum base + region mod + deck draw + card bonuses
• Win: take region. Lose vs. independent: gain ½ taxation (round up).
• Capitol capture: round finishes; if held at end → game over, +5VP
• Abandon region (→ independent, building destroyed, income recalcs)
• Discard Empire card (free slot; cannot benefit then discard same action)
END OF ROUND: collect income (taxation − upkeep)
Remove unpurchased era cards. Add next era cards. Recalculate
Income Rate. Select Initiative Track positions for new era.
Place tokens on track. For VP above 50 use a note card.
